description.value: Sonic Scream. You can use your action to violently expell air in a 15-foot cone. When you do so, each creature in the area of the exhalation must make a Wisdom saving throw. The DC for this saving throw equals 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier. A creature takes 2d6 sonic damage on a failed save, and half as much damage on a successful one. The damage increases to 4d6 at 5th level, 6d6 at 11th level, and 8d6 at 17th level. This ability has no effect on constructs.
